body:
## Rationale

Peak Dave Lombardo era and one of Slayer's best-selling albums — absent from `albumArticles.js`. Not in any open proposal.

Directly complements #2477 (South of Heaven, 1988) filed this run. Together, these two articles complete the full Lombardo Slayer cluster spanning the band's commercial peak (1988–1994).

**Content case:**
- Album: *Seasons in the Abyss* (Slayer, 1990)
- Drummer: Dave Lombardo
- Label: Def American/Columbia
- Reached #40 US Billboard 200; #1 on the Heatseekers chart
- Significance: The "Seasons in the Abyss" title track is one of metal's most iconic compositions — Lombardo's controlled double-bass pattern at mid-tempo (distinct from Reign in Blood blast beats) is cited in every drumming education context. "Dead Skin Mask", "War Ensemble" (speed) + "Seasons" (groove) = full range of Lombardo's ability on one album.
- Lombardo's kit: Pearl Masters Custom + Zildjian A + K series (transition from Reign in Blood Tama era)
- Fills arc: South of Heaven (1988) → **Seasons in the Abyss (1990)** → Divine Intervention (1994, Bostaph) / Christ Illusion (2006, Lombardo return)
- Dave Lombardo = significant GSC/TAM signal ("dave lombardo drum kit" query, "slayer drums" cluster)

## Files to touch
- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — 1 new entry, slug: `seasons-in-the-abyss-drum-setup`
- `public/llms/articles/seasons-in-the-abyss-drum-setup.md` — LLM companion

## Quality gate
- ≥300 words
- ≥3 FAQ Q&As: kit specs, double-bass technique on "War Ensemble", how it differs from RiB
- ≥3 internal links: reign-in-blood, show-no-mercy, south-of-heaven (once live), dave-lombardo profile
- Person schema (Dave Lombardo), MusicAlbum schema, MusicGroup (Slayer)
- relatedAlbums: ['reign-in-blood-drum-setup', 'south-of-heaven-drum-setup', 'show-no-mercy-drum-setup']

## Estimated organic uplift
- "dave lombardo drum kit" query (Slayer peak era anchor)
- "seasons in the abyss drums" + "slayer 1990 drum setup" long-tail
- Strengthens Slayer entity cluster for LLM citation ("who is slayer's drummer?")

## Verify
1. `grep 'seasons-in-the-abyss-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` returns entry
2. LLM companion exists at `public/llms/articles/seasons-in-the-abyss-drum-setup.md`
3. FAQPage JSON-LD present
4. Internal links to reign-in-blood and show-no-mercy confirmed

## Done
Article added to `albumArticles.js` with LLM companion file.
title: SEO: Slayer 'Seasons in the Abyss' drum setup article (Dave Lombardo, 1990 — peak Lombardo era, completes South of Heaven → Seasons → Divine Intervention cluster)
resolution: Both albumArticles.js entry (line 1228) and LLM markdown file were already fully implemented by prior commits. Entry includes Pearl Masters Custom gear breakdown, 5 FAQ Q&As (kit specs, War Ensemble double-bass technique, difference from Reign in Blood, cymbals, title track analysis), FAQPage/MusicAlbum/MusicGroup/Person JSON-LD schemas, relatedAlbums: ['reign-in-blood-drum-setup', 'south-of-heaven-drum-setup', 'show-no-mercy-drum-setup'], and internal links to reign-in-blood, south-of-heaven, show-no-mercy, and dave-lombardo profile. No changes needed.
